steps.title: Identify the logical requirement from the key phrase
steps.content: The phrase “was not the lowest count at any station:” sets the logical requirement: the blank must provide an example of a count lower than 36.

steps.title: Match the supporting evidence
steps.content:
Choice C provides 9 spotted frillgobies at station 3 — directly from the table — and 9 is lower than 36, which supports the claim that 36 wasn't the lowest.

Choices A and D offer higher counts, contradicting the requirement; B misreads the table.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
